title: Docs for import-gsd
goal: Add docs/interactive/import-gsd.md and docs/non-interactive/import-gsd.md following the existing per-command convention (sibling links, related commands), and list import-gsd in the docs/README.md index.

steps.title: CLI page non-interactive/import-gsd.md
steps.detail: Document mini import-gsd: synopsis (bare, --prompt, --apply, --force), description of the one-off GSD import flow, examples, sibling + related links matching the existing convention.

steps.title: Slash page interactive/import-gsd.md
steps.detail: Document /mini:import-gsd: what it does, in-session flow (check .planning/, confirm overwrite, --prompt, self-extract the contract, pipe into --apply), example, related links.

steps.title: List import-gsd in docs/README.md index
steps.detail: Add a Project setup row linking both variants and verify the cross-links resolve.
